stemHtml: To indicate that a luminous signal from the ground at night requesting help has been received and understood, the pilot will…

options.a: fly over the group of people in difficulty as low as possible.
options.b: transmit a luminous Morse signal of the letter “R” using the navigation lights.
options.c: make at least one complete turn over the group of people in difficulty.
options.d: switch on and off twice the aircraft’s landing lights, or if not so equipped, switch on and off twice the navigation lights.
